name: NodePins
description: Pin nodes to your screen as interactive, translucent live overlays that stay visible while you pan the desktop. Unlocked through a token-cost upgrade; each level adds a pin slot. Pins are draggable, colorized, and have per-pin opacity and scale settings.

perk_base_cost.title: Upgrade base cost (tokens)
perk_base_cost.description: Token cost of the first Node Pins upgrade level.

perk_cost_growth.title: Upgrade cost growth
perk_cost_growth.description: Cost multiplier per level. 2 doubles the price each level.

default_opacity.title: Default pin opacity
default_opacity.description: Starting transparency of newly pinned nodes (0.2 = very transparent, 1 = opaque).

default_pin_scale.title: Default pin scale
default_pin_scale.description: Starting scale of newly pinned nodes, relative to the node's own size (1 = actual size).
